description: CompositionBlack T-shirt made of 100% organic cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves, graphic print on the chest, nike swoosh printed on the left sleeve and “Bleed Blue” badge on the left hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergentDo not dry clean, iron or bleachTumble dry lowCrafted from soft organic cotton, this T-shirt from nike offers exemplary dry comfort, making it a great everyday choice for your cricket practice and casual days. Team this tee with jeans and running shoes for a sporty look. Add on a hooded sweatshirt for exemplary comfort during the winter.
